Title: Project evidence review assistant
Raw idea: Capture the key evidence, decisions, and outcomes from project delivery so future reviews are grounded in facts.
Evidence: Project teams often need to reconstruct why a decision was made.
Smallest validation: Run one manual review on a completed project and capture 10 evidence-chain records.
Success signal: Review time drops and future projects reuse prior evidence.
Failure signal: The capture burden is too high or no one reads the review.
Next step: Create a manual template and test it on one project.
